author_attribution: House of Mastery — Dr. Job Mogire, MD, FACC

ambient.use: Large background marks behind hero text. Disappear faintly.

featured.use: Medium decorative marks on cards (covenant entry section).

inline.use: Functional placement inside text or next to a label.

brand_colours.note: Icons inherit colour via currentColor; brand colours are applied to the parent element.

icons.concept: Self looking at self — the eye of awareness watching its own centre.
icons.glyph_description: Two concentric circles, small inside large.

icons.concept: Honouring the work entrusted to you.
icons.glyph_description: Chisel angled across the field, mid-stroke.

icons.concept: Becoming different at home before being different anywhere else.
icons.glyph_description: Two figures, head-and-shoulders silhouettes, sharing a baseline.

icons.concept: Acting on behalf of your seventy-year-old self.
icons.glyph_description: Horizon with a sun rising and an upward arrow.

icons.concept: Giving back from the life you have rebuilt.
icons.glyph_description: Globe with equator and two longitudinal arcs.

icons.concept: The Mind that Stopped Thinking — borrowed opinions, scrolled certainties.
icons.glyph_description: Open notebook with horizontal rule lines.

icons.concept: The Word that Lost Weight — promises broken without ceremony.
icons.glyph_description: Three horizontal lines; bottom line scripted as a signature.

icons.concept: The Time that Disappeared — years that cannot be accounted for.
icons.glyph_description: Hourglass — two triangles meeting at the waist.

icons.concept: The Money that Owns You — inherited patterns, unspoken weight.
icons.glyph_description: Coin face inscribed with an S-curve dollar glyph.

icons.concept: The People you are Performing With — performance over presence. Distinct from the covenant People glyph: the chamber is rendered as shared terrain, not as silhouettes.
icons.glyph_description: Mountain ridge with two peaks and a baseline floor.

icons.concept: Naming what is wrong faster than what to do about it.
icons.glyph_description: Speech bubble with two horizontal lines inside; tail descending.

icons.concept: Letting the harshest inner voice have the final say.
icons.glyph_description: Circle with vertical stroke and dot — caution rendered as observation, not reprimand.

icons.concept: Losing your own ground when you see someone else's.
icons.glyph_description: Two parallel verticals with horizontal arms reaching across.

icons.concept: Tracking the scoreboard instead of the work.
icons.glyph_description: Flag on a pole; flag billowing into a forked tail.

icons.concept: A small ornamental mark for threshold transitions or section separators.
